name: Provider latency degradation
triggers: model or provider latency exceeds threshold
responses slow without corresponding host pressure
facts_to_gather: provider latency p50 and p95 trend
classification_rules: if provider latency rises while host and prompt are stable then likely provider_issue
if provider latency rises and prompt size rises sharply then prompt_amplification_may_be_primary_or_contributing
if latency and retries surge together then likely upstream_instability
improvement_prompts: Should prompt size be part of provider latency triage every time?
Do we need failover policies for premium workflows?
